name: codex-math-web-v4
description: A lightweight Codex App Server web client with Markdown, KaTeX, model controls, status, and slash commands.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/icons.js && node --check public/math-renderer.js && node --check public/slash-input.js && node --check public/slash-commands.js && node --check public/status-data.js && node --check public/mcp-data.js && node --check public/thread-list-data.js && node --check public/diff-data.js && node --check public/composer-input.js && node --check public/thread-items.js && node --check public/session-state.js && node --check public/turn-activity.js
